title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Built a personal portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring dynamic project rendering, GitHub API integration, and a dark mode switcher.

title: Data Visualization Dashboard
description: Created an interactive data visualization dashboard using D3.js to explore and analyze large datasets with dynamic charts and filters.

title: COVID-19 Data Analysis
description: Analyzed COVID-19 spread patterns using Python and pandas, producing visualizations that highlight trends across different regions and demographics.

title: Machine Learning Housing Predictor
description: Developed a machine learning model using scikit-learn to predict housing prices in San Diego based on neighborhood features, size, and amenities.

title: Social Network Analysis
description: Performed graph-based social network analysis on a Twitter dataset to identify influential nodes and community structures using NetworkX.

title: Restaurant Review Sentiment Classifier
description: Built a natural language processing pipeline to classify Yelp restaurant reviews as positive or negative using TF-IDF features and logistic regression.

title: Weather Pattern Explorer
description: Designed an interactive web app to explore historical weather patterns using NOAA data, built with Python Flask and Chart.js.

title: UCSD Course Planner
description: Created a tool to help students plan their UCSD course schedule, checking prerequisite chains and generating optimized four-year plans.

title: Spotify Listening Trends
description: Analyzed personal Spotify streaming history to uncover listening trends, top artists, and genre preferences using Python and Matplotlib.

title: Transit Accessibility Map
description: Mapped public transit accessibility across San Diego using GTFS data and Leaflet.js to identify underserved neighborhoods.

title: Image Classification with CNNs
description: Implemented a convolutional neural network using PyTorch to classify images from the CIFAR-10 dataset, achieving 85% accuracy.

title: SQL Database Design Project
description: Designed and implemented a relational database schema for a university course registration system, including complex queries and stored procedures.
